name: StreamPulse Analytics
description:
StreamPulse is a high-fidelity digital twin of a production-grade analytics engineering project. It simulates a large-scale video streaming data platform (analogous to Netflix) to demonstrate expertise in **BigQuery architecture**, **dbt transformation modeling**, and **AI-driven data observability**.

## ✈ Architectural Vision

This project demonstrates a full **Medallion Architecture** (Bronze/Silver/Gold) handling complex streaming events at scale.

- **Staging (Bronze)**: Isolated raw ingestion from BigQuery with schema enforcement and deduplication logic.
- **Intermediate (Silver)**: Implements complex state-tracking transformations like **SCD Type 2** for subscription lifecycles.
- **Marts (Gold)**: Cleaned, business-ready dimensions and facts (e.g., `fct_mrr`) optimized for consumer-facing BI layers.

## Ὦ0 Tech Stack & Methodology

- **Data Modeling**: dbt-core patterns (SCDs, Incremental loads, Snapshots).
- **Data Warehouse**: BigQuery simulation (Clustering, Partitioning strategies).
- **AI/LLM**: **Google Gemini 3 API** for real-world fiscal grounding and technical consulting.
- **Frontend**: React 19, Tailwind CSS, Recharts.

## Ὄ9 Key Engineering Features

### Interactive dbt Lineage
Explore the interactive DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph) to see how data flows from raw logs to executive KPIs. The **Model Inspector** provides a look at the compiled SQL logic used for billion-row aggregations.

### Live Fiscal Grounding
The platform uses Gemini's **Google Search Tooling** to fetch verified Q3/Q4 2024 benchmarks directly from official Netflix earnings reports. This ensures portfolio is always grounded in real market data.

### Architect Q&A (RAG-Simulated)
An integrated technical consultant trained on project's metadata. It can explain implementation choices, such as why a specific partitioning key was chosen or how to churn logic is calculated.

## Ὄ1 Project Structure

```text
├── components/          # UI Modules (Dashboard, Lineage, Chat)
├── services/            # Gemini API & Data Fetching Logic
├── constants.tsx        # dbt Model Definitions & Mock Artifacts
├── types.ts             # TypeScript Domain Interfaces
├── App.tsx              # Application Orchestrator
└── index.html           # ESM Entry Point
```

## ✅ Value Proposition

StreamPulse Analytics demonstrates enterprise-level analytics engineering capabilities including:

- **Production-Ready Architecture**: Scalable data pipeline design patterns used by leading tech companies
- **Advanced Data Modeling**: SCD Type 2 implementation, incremental loads, and proper dimensional modeling
- **Real-World Integration**: AI-powered benchmarking against actual Netflix earnings data
- **Interactive Visualization**: Professional dashboards with drill-down capabilities and real-time updates
- **Modern Development Stack**: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and cutting-edge tooling

## ⭕ Core Purpose

This portfolio project serves as both a learning tool and a professional demonstration piece, illustrating complete analytics engineering lifecycle from data ingestion to business intelligence delivery. It showcases how to build maintainable, scalable data platforms that can handle billions of events while providing actionable insights to business stakeholders.
